message:
feat(hostcall): integrate AMAC batch executor into hostcall dispatch pipeline (bd-3ar8v.4.23)

Wire the AMAC-style interleaved hostcall batch executor into the
pump_js_runtime_once dispatch loop. Requests are grouped by kind
(session read/write, event read/write, tool, exec, http, ui, log),
and per-group interleave vs sequential decisions are made based on
stall telemetry. Timing observations feed back to an EMA tracker
for adaptive toggling.

Key changes:
- Thread-local AmacBatchExecutor persists telemetry across pump cycles
- dispatch_requests routes through AMAC planner when enabled
- dispatch_one helper records per-call nanosecond timing
- Public amac_telemetry_snapshot() for external observability
- AmacBatchExecutor derives Clone for JsRuntimeHost compatibility
- 4 new unit tests (clone semantics, config, serialization)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
